name: tokentama
description: An AI-efficiency companion that scores prompt waste, coaches better prompts, and grows a tamagotchi ecosystem that thrives when you prompt efficiently.

chatParticipants.name: tokentama
chatParticipants.description: Score a prompt's efficiency and suggest a leaner version

tokentama.passiveCapture.enabled.description: Passively read VS Code Copilot chat sessions to score prompts automatically. Experimental and read-only.

tokentama.coaching.llmProvider.description: LLM provider for coaching tips. 'none' uses the offline heuristic coach.

tokentama.coaching.model.description: Model or deployment name used for coaching.

tokentama.sustainability.whPerThousandTo.description: Estimated watt-hours consumed per 1,000 tokens, used for the sustainability estimate.

tokentama.sustainability.gridGramsCo2Per.description: Grid carbon intensity (gCO2e per kWh) for the sustainability estimate.

tokentama.impact.co2GramsPer1kTokens.description: Estimated grams of CO2e per 1,000 tokens, used for the headline environmental impact.

tokentama.impact.waterMlPer1kTokens.description: Estimated millilitres of water per 1,000 tokens, used for the headline environmental impact.

tokentama.impact.usdPerCredit.description: US dollars per Copilot AI credit (AIC), used only to derive an OPTIONAL $ estimate. Copilot meters usage in AICs, so tokens and AICs are the measured units; set this to your org's internal $/AIC rate for a dollar figure. 0 hides $ and shows tokens + AICs instead.

tokentama.health.maxDamage.description: Max health a single fully-wasteful prompt removes at baseline intensity, before cost/carbon scaling.

tokentama.health.healRate.description: Health restored by an efficient prompt. Kept small so healing stays well below damage.

tokentama.health.healThreshold.description: Overall score at or above which a prompt heals the pet instead of damaging it.

tokentama.health.baselineCostUsd.description: Cost (USD) treated as normal for one prompt; damage scales up as a prompt's cost/carbon exceeds this.

tokentama.health.maxIntensity.description: Upper bound on the cost/carbon intensity multiplier that amplifies damage for expensive/heavy prompts.

enumDescriptions: Live scoring via @tokentama/compose, reconciled against on-disk sessions for real tokens (recommended).
Live event path only — no on-disk watcher.
On-disk watcher only — legacy passive capture.
Capture only THIS window's Copilot sessions.
Track every Copilot chat across all windows (recommended — just works as one app).
tokentama.capture.scope.description: Which Copilot sessions live capture watches.

tokentama.telemetry.enabled.description: Collect local, anonymized pilot telemetry (prompt scores, suggestions shown/adopted). Off by default; nothing leaves your machine — use 'Export pilot data' to share explicitly.

tokentama.telemetry.hashPrompts.description: Hash prompt text in telemetry/export instead of storing it raw. Keep on unless raw text is explicitly consented for the pilot.

tokentama.corpus.enabled.description: Record every captured prompt and its lean rewrite to a local training corpus (used to build an automatic prompt-rewriter). Stored on-device only.

tokentama.corpus.storeRawText.description: Store raw prompt + rewrite text in the local corpus. Required to train a text-to-text rewriter on your own style. Never leaves your machine; turn off to store hashes only.

enumDescriptions: Deterministic offline cleanup only (strips filler/politeness) — zero tokens.
Use your own Copilot model (via VS Code) for a real rewrite; falls back to offline cleanup if unavailable (recommended).
Use an external LLM provider configured under tokentama.coaching.
tokentama.rewriter.mode.description: How the 'Rewrite in my style' action produces a leaner, more precise prompt.

tokentama.rewriter.model.description: Model/deployment used for llm-mode rewrites. Leave empty to use the coaching model (defaults to a low-cost model such as gpt-4o-mini).

tokentama.rewriter.fewShotK.description: How many similar past rewrites from your corpus to use as style examples for llm-mode rewrites.

tokentama.rewriter.sessionTokenBudget.description: Max tokens Tokentama may spend on automatic model rewrites per session before it falls back to the free offline cleanup. Protects net savings from speculative spend. 0 disables the cap.
